title: memory_dff: Fix checking of feedback mux input when more than one mux

features.name: memory array with procedural feedback assignment
features.description: Code should include a memory array declaration with a procedural assignment that feeds back the output through a conditional mux
features.snippet:
reg [7:0] bram[0:255];
always @(posedge clk) rdata <= re ? bram[addr] : rdata;

features.name: nested ternary in memory read feedback path
features.description: Code should include nested ternary operators in the memory read feedback path creating multiple muxes
